h1: Two-Shot Molding vs. Overmolding: What You Need to Know

Advantages and disadvantages of two-shot molding
Choosing between two-shot molding and overmolding
Why Does 3D Printing Layer Height Matter?
Using 3D-Printed Lattices to Maximize Noise- and Shock-Absorption

meta_description: Two-shot molding and overmolding are similar but have a few key distinctions — here’s what engineers and designers need to know.

sections.heading: Two-Shot Molding vs. Overmolding: What You Need to Know
sections.text: Two-Shot Molding vs. Overmolding: What You Need to Know Published on December 16, 2020 Originally published on fastradius.com on by December 16, 2020 Injection molding is a popular manufacturing process that’s ideal for quickly creating precise parts with intricate shapes, all without leaving behind a lot of material waste. Common applications include packaging, automotive dashboards, mechanical parts like gears, and even popular kids’ toys. Many different processes fall under the umbrella of injection molding, including two-shot molding and overmolding . These two processes are similar but have a few key distinctions — here’s what engineers and designers need to know: What is two-shot mold...
